description: Live in-browser verification of the running Catbook app (server serving the production Vite build on an in-memory MongoDB, driven headlessly).

chatPage.messageSentOverSocket: Ada Lovelace: Hello from the browser over Socket.io!
chatPage.note: Message was sent via socket.emit('chat:send') from the browser, broadcast back as 'chat:new', and persisted to MongoDB (loaded from history on reload).

sessionPersistence: Reloading the page restored the logged-in user via the session cookie (GET /api/whoami).
